<!-- {{< include ../../../../shared/includes/math-symbols.qmd >}} -->

<!-- Decorations -->
\newcommand{\circled}[1]{\enclose{circle}{#1}}
<!-- \newcommand{\boxed}[1]{\enclose{box}{#1}} -->



<!-- Shortcuts -->
\newcommand{\lp}{\left(}
\newcommand{\rp}{\right)}
\newcommand{\lb}{\left[}
\newcommand{\rb}{\right]}
\newcommand{\bs}{\boldsymbol}
\newcommand{\mrm}{\mathrm}
\newcommand{\mbb}{\mathbb}
\newcommand{\mcal}{\mathcal}
\newcommand{\msf}{\mathsf}



<!-- Common -->
\newcommand{\const}{\text{const}}
\newcommand{\fix}{\text{fix}}
\DeclareMathOperator{\sgn}{sgn}
\newcommand{\defin}[1]{\overset{\text{def}}{#1}}



<!-- Logic -->
\newcommand{\true}{\mathsf{T}}
\newcommand{\false}{\mathsf{F}}



<!-- Sets of Numbers -->
\newcommand{\setN}{\mathbb{N}}
\newcommand{\setNo}{\mathbb{N}_0}
\newcommand{\setZ}{\mathbb{Z}}
\newcommand{\setQ}{\mathbb{Q}}
\newcommand{\setI}{\mathbb{R}\setminus\mathbb{Q}}
\newcommand{\setR}{\mathbb{R}}
\newcommand{\setC}{\mathbb{C}}
\newcommand{\setIm}{i\mathbb{R}}



<!-- Calculus & Analysis -->
\newcommand{\seq}[2]{({#1}_{#2})}
\newcommand{\seqq}[2]{({#1}_{#2})_{{#2}=1}^\infty}




<!-- Linear Algebra -->
\newcommand{\ip}[1]{^{(#1)}}
\newcommand{\ib}[1]{^{[#1]}}
\newcommand{\v}{\mathbf}
\newcommand{\tp}{\mathrm{T}}


<!-- Probability Theory -->
\newcommand{\toas}{\overset{\text{a.s.}}{\to}}
\newcommand{\toprob}{\overset{p}{\to}}
\newcommand{\todist}{\overset{d}{\to}}
